name: TensorPM v1.12.2-beta.1 (Beta)
body:
# Changelog - v1.12.2-beta.1

## 🎉 New Features

### Smoother first-run onboarding

TensorPM's first-run setup now feels more conversational and less abrupt while it prepares your first project.

**What Changed:**

- ✅ **Name collection happens naturally** — TensorPM can ask how it should address you, then continues without blocking the project setup flow.
- ✅ **Project generation can keep running in the background** — After you describe your first project, TensorPM can continue preparing it while you answer the remaining onboarding questions.
- ✅ **A clear escape while the first project is being created** — If you do not want to wait, you can set up the project later and continue to the tour instead.
- ✅ **A softer handoff into the project** — Opening the prepared project now uses a short fade instead of a hard visual cut.

## 🐛 Bug Fixes

### More reliable onboarding cancellation

- ✅ **Cancelled onboarding projects are cleaned up** — If project creation finishes after you cancel, TensorPM removes the generated project instead of leaving it behind.
- ✅ **Aborted generation no longer shows stale errors** — Cancelling project setup clears the generation state without showing a failure message.
- ✅ **Proxy onboarding calls now time out cleanly** — Slow onboarding chat and project-generation requests now return a helpful timeout message instead of leaving the flow waiting indefinitely.

## 🏗️ Improvements

### Welcome screen polish

- ✅ **Updated welcome copy** — The welcome screen now positions TensorPM more clearly as an AI-assisted way to deliver your project.
- ✅ **Borderless welcome toggles** — The video toggle and EN/DE language switcher now share the same cleaner, borderless style.
- ✅ **Better action alignment** — Tour and project-ready buttons align more consistently with the onboarding text.

## 📝 Notes

This beta focuses on onboarding polish and reliability. There are no database, sync, account, or billing changes.

---

## 📅 Release Info

- **Version**: 1.12.2-beta.1
- **Release Date**: 2026-06-20
- **Previous Version**: 1.12.1-beta.1
- **Type**: Patch Beta Release
